rulings.Case Title: DEEANNA M. BROSSOIT VS. DREXEL BRADSHAW et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 2. DEFENDANT DREXEL BRADSHAW, BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off calendar. Insufficient proof of service per CCP 1005(b). =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA GUADALUPE BOJORQUEZ VS. ABM INDUSTRIES, INCORPORATED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel An Independent Medical Examination Of Pltf; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANT ABM JANITORIAL SERVICES - NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel An Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff; Request For Sanctions. Defendant's motion to compel I.M.E. of plaintiff is granted in part. Plaintiff must undergo the I.M.E. However, the examination is limited to issues of plaintiff's sexual history and history of trauma. It will not include issues of substance abuse or reproductive history. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: EUREKA GARDEN HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION VS. DONALD WILLIAM DANMEIER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order To Compel The Depo Of Robert Brandt And Suzanne Eisenhut And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT DONALD DANMEIER, DANMEIER ARCHITECTS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORAION, MATTHEW KLUNIS Motion For Order To Compel The Deposition Of Robert Brandt And Suzanne Eisenhut And For Monetary Sanctions. Defendants' motion to compel denied. Defendants' request for sanctions denied. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: SUNQUEST PROPERTIES, INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. RYAN ENGINEERING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ryan Engineering Inc'S Motion For A Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 4. Ryan Engineering Inc'S Motion For A Protective Order. Defendant's motion for protective order is denied. Plaintiffs will be allowed to depose attorney Kinney on non-privileged aspects of the negotiations (ie - what he was a percipient witness to, not his impressions, strategies, client communications). =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ROGELIO HECHAVARRIA VS. ELIAS GEORGOPOULOS et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT ELIAS GEORGOPOULOS'S Motion For Stay Of State Court Procedings. Defendant's motion to stay proceedings is denied. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. A CALIFORNIA VS. JILLA ISAACSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 6. DEFENDANT JILLA ISAACSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's motion to set aside default and for leave to defend is granted. Plaintiff's motion for attorney fees is granted. Defendant must pay $560 in attorney fees to plaintiff's attorney. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN PROBST VS. HEALTH NET, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Health Net, Inc, Health Net Of California, Inc'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 11. Defendants Health Net, Inc, Health Net Of California, Inc'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings. Defendant's motion to compel arbitration as to plaintiff Endersen is denied. The arbitration clause in his wife's application violates the Knox-Keene Act. Defendant's motion to compel arbitration as to plaintiff Probst requires further argument on whether the arbitration clause is unconscionable. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: BEVERLY BENITES VS. TIFFANY DIGIORE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 7. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to September 20, 2011. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of motion and reply to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Arbitration, Stay Foreclosure, And Req. For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 19, 2011, line 8. PETITIONER SEVAN MINASIAN'S Motion To Compel Arbitration, Stay Foreclosure, And Req. For Attorney's Fees. Petitioner's motion to compel arbitration and for stay of foreclosure sale pending outcome of arbitration is granted. The parties are ordered to complete arbitration within 75 days. If arbitration is not completed within that time, the parties are required to report back to this court on the reasons arbitration has not been completed. Respondents are ordered to pay attorney fees to petitioner's counsel in the amount of $3,712.50. =(302/LMG)
